3139120.name: THREE VERSES³
3139120.description:
THREE VERSES is a first person dungeon crawler / typing game based on poetry. Having shed your corporeal form, you must now escape purgatory by completing the simple task of delivering verses from deities to struggling poets.

In this journey, it is essential that you write down key information. You will encounter typing-based RPG battles, word puzzles, and a variety of typing and movement-based minigames across an expansive grid-based world.
3139120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
